__about__: UMAF Tools Configuration — single source of truth for all role tool assignments. This file is auto-loaded by main.py. Use --tools-config to point at a custom file instead.
__format__: Top-level keys are pipeline names. Each pipeline maps role names to lists of tool names. Role names match case-insensitively against ToolRegistry method suffixes (e.g. 'worker' matches both research_worker_tools and coderpp_worker_tools). A '__global__' key applies to ALL pipelines as fallback.

__tools_reference__._description: All 8 available tools. Use these names in role tool lists below.

read_file.description: Read contents of a file at the given path.

write_file.description: Write content to a file. Creates parent directories as needed. Best for single-string content.

write_lines.description: Write a list of lines to a file. Preferred over write_file for code — each line is a separate string, avoiding multi-line string escaping issues.

run_command.description: Run a shell command and return stdout + stderr. Use for testing, file listing, pip install, git operations.

call_claude.description: Call Claude Code CLI for a complex reasoning subtask. Spawns a nested claude -p process. Use sparingly — only for tasks that need deep reasoning.

web_search.description: Search the web via DuckDuckGo Lite. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets. No API key needed.

web_fetch.description: Fetch content from a URL via urllib (bypasses Claude Code network sandbox). Use for reading papers, articles, documentation pages.

download_file.description: Download a URL to a local file via urllib. Use for arxiv.org PDFs, datasets, or any binary/content files that need local access.

__timeouts__._description: Override per-tool timeouts in seconds. Omitted tools keep their defaults listed above.

__global__._description: Applied to ALL pipelines as fallback when a pipeline-specific section doesn't define a role. Leave empty to require explicit per-pipeline definitions.

research._description: Research Pipeline: head decomposes topic → workers research in parallel → reviewer scores → writer generates LaTeX report.

coder._description: Coder Pipeline: coder implements → reviewer validates → loop until pass (max 5 cycles).

coderpp._description: CoderPP Pipeline: head decomposes → workers implement in parallel → reviewer validates → organizer assembles final output.

topology._description: Topology Pipeline: analyzer assesses task complexity → designer proposes candidate topologies → evaluator scores them → writer produces spec + report.

skill._description: Skill Pipeline: scanner classifies artifact → 4 parallel detectors analyze skill dimensions → aggregator merges → writer produces skills.json + report.

feature._description: Feature Pipeline: scanner surveys project → planner creates implementation plan → coder implements ↔ reviewer validates (max 5 cycles) → writer reports.

self_evolution._description: Self-Evolution Pipeline: analyzer scans codebase -> planner creates plan -> coder implements <-> reviewer validates (max 3 cycles) -> writer reports.

plan._description: Plan Pipeline: scanner gathers project context -> decomposer builds task tree -> 4 parallel analyzers (dependency, risk, resource, cross-cutting) -> writer synthesizes plan spec + report.
